_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: Proteomic profiling analysis provided significant insight into how the genomic context influenced the therapy response, particularly in the case of oncogene addiction
details: Provided significant insight into how genomic context influenced therapy response, particularly in oncogene addiction cases
